regulations.name: PHI Non-Disclosure
regulations.description: Protected Health Information must not be disclosed without patient consent

regulations.name: Minimum Necessary Standard
regulations.description: Only the minimum necessary PHI should be used or disclosed

regulations.name: Off-Label Use Disclosure
regulations.description: Off-label drug use must be clearly disclosed

regulations.name: Medical Disclaimer Required
regulations.description: AI-generated clinical content must include provider verification disclaimer

regulations.name: Diagnostic Uncertainty
regulations.description: Definitive diagnoses should not be stated without appropriate caveats
